frame_analyses.description: Black screen with Dr Tayyab Ch watermark - video introduction
External view of laparoscopic trainer box being prepared
View inside trainer showing Penrose drain with marks and foam appendage setup
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clear visualization of task materials and target marks

frame_analyses.description: Close-up of yellow foam with pre-marked slit, showing target marks clearly
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Educational demonstration of proper mark placement

frame_analyses.description: Laparoscopic view showing needle drivers and purple suture being loaded
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Demonstrating proper needle loading technique with appropriate grip

frame_analyses.description: Needle being driven through first mark on Penrose drain
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Demonstrating perpendicular entry angle and proper needle driving

frame_analyses.description: Final view showing completed suture with scissors cutting excess
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Demonstrating proper suture tail cutting technique

confidence_rationale: This is an instructional video demonstrating equipment and technique, not a performance to be scored
cannot_determine: Performance metrics - video shows instructional content with equipment demonstration and technique overview rather than a timed performance
technique_summary: Instructional video demonstrating FLS Task 5 setup, materials, and basic technique elements including needle loading, suture placement, and cutting

demonstrated_techniques: Proper FLS trainer setup and preparation
Correct positioning of Penrose drain with marked targets
Appropriate needle loading with laparoscopic instruments
Demonstration of suture driving through tissue marks
common_errors_addressed: Shows proper equipment preparation before beginning task
Demonstrates clear visualization of target marks before suturing
